subject: VNFM-adapter health check failing
commit_message:
VNFM-adapter health check failing

Configured the VNFM adapter to support https as is being used by the health check request

Signed-off-by: MichaelMorris <michael.morris@est.tech>
Issue-ID: SO-2517
Change-Id: I2076a02788c2f74b90939a9e3684f917079cf7b2

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 1:

I'm not sure if it's solved or not?

Patch Set 1:

we need to manually pull the patch and test with robot modified to use https in the robot_properties.py. I can do that in staging.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

change has been done on Robot side to set http..the patch has been merged
as you can see on SO daily or gating https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap/-/jobs/345249450

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

> change has been done on Robot side to set http..the patch has been merged
> as you can see on SO daily or gating https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap/-/jobs/345249450

it has been cherry picked on el alto => but we need to move the tag to take it into account.

Is https the target?
